headline: Employee Performance Management Market - Global Forecast to 2030 with Strategic Disruption Through Technology, Patents, Digital, and AI Adoption
summary: The global employee performance management market is projected to grow from USD 3.52 billion in 2025 to USD 6.33 billion by 2030, at a CAGR of 12.4%, driven by rapid digitalization and cloud-based solutions. North America, with its advanced IT infrastructure, leads the market, spearheaded by key players like SAP SuccessFactors, Oracle, Workday, and Microsoft. headline: Workday Named a 2026 LinkedIn Top Company in Canada for the Fourth Consecutive Year
summary: Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY), the enterprise AI platform for managing people, money, and agents, today announced it has been named a 2026 LinkedIn Top Company in Canada for the fourth consecutive year.

headline: Workday Government Unveils Personnel Action Request (PAR) Agent to Modernize Federal HR and Strengthen Mission Readiness
summary: Workday Government (NASDAQ: WDAY), the enterprise AI platform for managing people, finance, and agents, today unveiled a new Personnel Action Request (PAR) Agent. Designed specifically for federal agencies, the PAR Agent modernizes how agencies manage critical HR transactions while keeping missions moving forward and delivering more value for U.S. taxpayers.
